creator: romain@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Dima Panov from comment #11)
> Please ship both patches to the ports, if you wish.

Great!  Can you please validate this commit message for lang/ruby{24,25}:

-------------------------------------- 8< --------------------------------------
Revert the "DLD_FLAGS" pollution part of r475483. It was initially got from ruby23, but recent ruby releases have some differences in runtime linking, which was not hit by exp-run, and caused trouble with some ports (e.g. devel/leatherman, sysutils/facter).

PR:           230238
Submitted by: fluffy
Reported by:  freebsd@ptty.com
Approved by:  fluffy
-------------------------------------- 8< --------------------------------------
